name: showCodeExample
description: Display the exact code fragment, data record, trace, JSON, SQL, or structured example being explained. The content is rendered in a VS Code-style window with preserved whitespace and line numbers.

parameters.description: Formatting label such as python, javascript, typescript, json, sql, text, record, or trace.
The exact complete code or structured data being discussed. Preserve indentation and line breaks. Keep it compact enough to explain verbally.
Optional one-sentence caption identifying what the learner should notice. Do not provide a long second explanation.
